message.content:

1. src/app/page.tsx
2. src/app/globals.css  
3. src/app/layout.tsx

6. src/components/flickering-grid.tsx (if exists)
7. src/components/sections/features.tsx

I need to understand the full current state of the enterprise site - every visual element, component structure, and styling.

content.text: Now let me read the component files:
Great! The aurora-text file exists. Let me read both of those component files:

Perfect! I have successfully read all the requested files. Here's a comprehensive summary of the full current state of the enterprise site:

## COMPLETE FILE CONTENTS

### 1. **src/app/page.tsx**
```typescript
import { CTA } from "@/components/sections/cta";
import { Features } from "@/components/sections/features";
import { Footer } from "@/components/sections/footer";
import { Header } from "@/components/sections/header";
import { Hero } from "@/components/sections/hero";
import { Logos } from "@/components/sections/logos";
import { Pricing } from "@/components/sections/pricing";

export default function Home() {
  return (
    <main>
      <Header />
      <Hero />
      <Logos />
      <Features />
      <Pricing />
      <CTA />
      <Footer />
    </main>
  );
}
```

### 2. **src/app/globals.css**
Complete CSS with Tailwind directives and design tokens:
- **CSS Variables** include:
  - Light mode: white background, dark text, purple primary (#263 84% 50%)
  - Dark mode: dark background (#225 15% 6%), light text, adjusted colors
  - Gradient colors (--color-1 through --color-5) for aurora effects
  - Chart colors and border/input tokens
  - Header height: 3.5rem
- **Scrollbar styling**: 5px width, transparent track, border-colored thumb
- **Font**: Inter (with fallback to InterVariable with CSS font-variation-settings)

### 3. **src/app/layout.tsx**
Root layout component:
- Uses Geist Sans and Geist Mono fonts
- Applies ThemeProvider with light theme by default, system preference disabled
- Includes ThemeToggle and TailwindIndicator components
- Metadata constructed from siteConfig
- Viewport set to light color scheme with media queries for dark mode
- Smooth scrolling enabled

### 4. **src/components/section.tsx**
Reusable Section wrapper component:
- Props: id, title, subtitle, description, children, className, align (left/center/right)
- Renders a `<section>` with:
  - Title (uppercase, small, muted)
  - Subtitle (large, bold, lowercase, 4xl-6xl responsive)
  - Description (large text, muted)
  - FlickeringGrid background (4px squares, 4px gap, gray color #6B7280, 0.2 max opacity)
  - Gradient overlay fading from background color
  - Border-x and border-t styling
  - Responsive padding (p-2 py-8 mobile, md:p-12 tablet+)

### 5. **src/components/aurora-text.tsx**
Aurora glow text effect component:
- Renders text with animated aurora backgrounds (5 layers)
- Each layer uses CSS animations:
  - `aurora-border`: 6s ease-in-out (morphing border-radius)
  - `aurora-1` through `aurora-5`: 12s ease-in-out (movement patterns)
- Colors use HSL variables --color-1 through --color-5
- Blur filter: 1rem
- Mix blend modes: lighten (light) / darken (dark)
- Initial positions: top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right, centered

### 6. **src/components/ui/flickering-grid.tsx**
Canvas-based flickering grid animation:
- Props: squareSize (4), gridGap (6), flickerChance (0.3), color, width, height, maxOpacity (0.3)
- Uses requestAnimationFrame for smooth 60fps animation
- IntersectionObserver to pause when off-screen
- ResizeObserver for responsive canvas sizing
- High DPI support (devicePixelRatio)
- Color conversion from any CSS color to RGBA
- Float32Array for efficient opacity tracking

### 7. **src/components/sections/features.tsx**
Features grid section component:
- Maps `siteConfig.features` array
- 3-column responsive grid (1 column mobile, 2 md, 3 lg)
- Each feature card:
  - Icon with gradient background (primary to primary/80)
  - Feature name (centered, xl font, medium weight)
  - Description (small text, muted)
  - "Learn more >" link
  - Hover effect: background color change
- Smart border rendering with nth-child selectors for responsive grid lines

### 8. **tailwind.config.ts**
Tailwind configuration:
- Dark mode: class-based
- Container: centered, 1000px max (2xl breakpoint)
- **Fonts**: Geist Sans and Geist Mono via CSS variables
- **Colors**: All from HSL CSS variables (border, input, ring, background, foreground, primary, secondary, destructive, muted, accent, popover, card)
- **Animations**:
  - marquee / marquee-vertical (horizontal/vertical scrolling)
  - border-beam (offset-distance animation)
  - accordion-down / accordion-up
  - ripple (scale pulse)
  - orbit (rotation + translation)
- **Background sizes**: grid-1 through grid-6 (100% to 1/6 width)
- **Background images**: Linear gradient grid patterns
- **Plugins**: tailwindcss-animate, @tailwindcss/typography

## VISUAL ARCHITECTURE SUMMARY

**Page Structure**: Header → Hero → Logos → Features → Pricing → CTA → Footer

**Design System**: 
- Purple primary accent (#263 84% 50%)
- Clean minimalist borders (x and top borders)
- Gradient overlays and aurora glow effects
- Responsive typography (4xl-6xl headings)
- Microanimations (flickering grids, aurora glows)
- Canvas-based performance optimization

**Key Visual Elements**:
- Flickering grid backgrounds with performance optimization
- Aurora text glow effect with multi-layer color animation
- Responsive grid layouts with smart border management
- Section wrappers with consistent styling
- Theme toggle support (light/dark)
